creator: me@willmays.com
text:
Port for net/Cacti (cacti-0.8.6j.3_2)

Checksum error on thumbnail_graphs_not_working.patch

Manually download patch from cacti website then 'make makesum' resolves issue. Checksum difference between ports and actual.

Fix: 

Update distinfo file to below:

How-To-Repeat: Install or upgrade the port from current CVS
